mapper.sql: q.id, q.order_no, q.project_id, q.user_id, q.user_name, q.user_phone, q.paotui_id, q.paotui_name, q.target_address, q.fee, q.confirm_time, q.score, q.is_pay, q.pay_time, q.remark, q.create_time, p.title as project_title
mapper.select: select from querendingdan q left join paotuixiangmu p on q.project_id = p.id where q.id = #{id}
select from querendingdan q left join paotuixiangmu p on q.project_id = p.id where q.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: insert into querendingdan (order_no, project_id, user_id, user_name, user_phone, paotui_id, paotui_name, target_address, fee, confirm_time, score, is_pay, pay_time, remark, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, #{targetAddress}, #{fee}, #{confirmTime}, #{score}, #{isPay}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, now())

insert into querendingdan
order_no, project_id, user_id, user_name, user_phone, paotui_id, paotui_name, target_address, fee, confirm_time, score, is_pay, pay_time, remark, create_time,
#{orderNo}, #{projectId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{paotuiId}, #{paotuiName}, #{targetAddress}, #{fee}, #{confirmTime}, #{score}, #{isPay}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, now(),
